resources.string: 💡 Recommended: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf (~1GB) — more stable translation quality

MoYue supports local AI translation without internet.
How to use: 1. Switch to "Local Model" 2. Tap the button below to select a model file 3. While reading, long-press to select text, then tap "AI Translate"
Download models (.gguf format): Recommended: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf (~1GB, stable translation quality) Download: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-GGUF Or China mirror: https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-GGUF
Lightweight: Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf (~354MB) https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-GGUF
Speed reference (Snapdragon 8 Gen 3): • 0.5B: first token 0.7-1.3s, translation 4-8s • 1.5B: first token 1.3-2.1s, translation 6-15s • Larger models = better accuracy, recommended to use 1.5B

Cloud translation uses online API for fast, high-quality results.
Default configuration: • API: DeepSeek (api.deepseek.com) • Model: deepseek-chat • Only need an API Key to use
How to get a DeepSeek API Key: 1. Visit https://platform.deepseek.com 2. Register with phone or email 3. After login, click the avatar in the top-right → "API Keys" 4. Click "Create API Key" and copy it 5. Paste into the "API Key" field below
Note: DeepSeek gives 5 CNY free credits on registration (~100,000 translations).
You can also use other OpenAI-compatible APIs: • Tongyi Qianwen: dashscope.aliyuncs.com • Moonshot: api.moonshot.cn • SiliconFlow: api.siliconflow.cn Just change the Base URL and API Key

MoYue offers multiple TTS engines.
Edge TTS (recommended, free): • Microsoft free speech synthesis, good quality • Requires internet, no API key needed • Supports multiple languages and voices
AI Voice (cloud TTS): • Uses cloud TTS services like SiliconFlow • Supports MOSS-TTSD, CosyVoice2, and more • Requires server URL and API Key • Example: SiliconFlow at https://api.siliconflow.cn
Custom TTS: • Compatible with OpenAI TTS API format • Can connect to any OpenAI-compatible TTS service
Speed adjustment: Drag the slider to change reading speed 0.5x = slow, 1.0x = normal, 2.0x = fast
